title: Intercropping on an operational scale in an improved farming system
abstract:
Mixed cropping, or intercropping, evolved in traditional agriculture where it has been practiced at a low level of technology largely for risk reduction recent research has
shown substantial benefits from intercropping at medium to high levels of technology, however, due to several factors, including the lack of operational-scale research,
sole-cropping technology is being promoted by national programs, and the potentia1 benefits of improved intercropping are not being achieved...
